title: 2 things about the Angels
wikitext:
[]: 2 things about the Angels... [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by Koichimaru » Wed Jul 29, 2009 9:53 pm So, I've always wondered, how were the names of the Angels introduced in the original? Was it in the episode where Seele reviews the Angel attacks (My memory of the original series is kinda' fuzzy; I've only seen EoE and RoE recently.)? Also, seeing how the Angels Sahaquiel, Bardiel, and Zeruel were so radically, and amazingly, changed from their original incarnations (Ramiel, too), when speaking of them, should they be referred to as (for instance) Sahaquiel-Rebuild, or Saha-R?

[]: Re: 2 things about the Angels... [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 29, 2009 10:21 pm Please look at the spoiler rules, Koichimaru. I gave you a break because you seem to be pretty new and haven't been around much, but you didn't label your thread properly and comments on Angel design changes can be considered spoilers. Koichimaru wrote: So, I've always wondered, how were the names of the Angels introduced in the original? Was it in the episode where Seele reviews the Angel attacks (My memory of the original series is kinda' fuzzy; I've only seen EoE and RoE recently.)?

[]: Re: 2 things about the Angels... [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by Koichimaru » Wed Jul 29, 2009 10:30 pm Aw, crap! Sorry, I can't believe I forgot to put the warning! Shanshel's design- didn't it only have moving bone legs, the Sachiel mask added into the design? GNR? Giant Naked Rei? Huh. Neo- sounds pretty good. Hmm... Alright, well, I'll remember the spoiler warning next time, thanks!

[]: Re: 2 things about the Angels... [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 29, 2009 10:36 pm Koichimaru wrote: Shanshel's design- didn't it only have moving bone legs, the Sachiel mask added into the design?

[]:             Quote Post by Koichimaru » Thu Jul 30, 2009 2:35 pm Ah, I see. I guess I didn't really notice it that much; Ramiel outshined the rest of that movie for me. BTW, good job on the ep. 24 "Bad End." It would be cool to see that animated.
